Quick facts
The Jaguar Rescue Center is an animal rescue center located near Puerto Viejo de Talamanca in the Lim√≥n Province of Costa Rica. The center is dedicated to the rehabilitation of mistreated, injured, orphaned, and/or confiscated animals.Wikipedia
